title: Ash Clay
description: A mod about a clay-like substance obtained from wood ash.
body:
A simple mod that adds ash clay, a self-setting clay-like substance made from wood ash, as well as some blocks made of it.

This is a very small content mod that intends to provide a furnace alternative if stone is unavailable, for example in the early stages of a skyblock-style modpack.
The progression can be summarized in a few steps:
- Craft and place a campfire
- Break the campfire (without silk touch) to obtain ash
- Use a bowl on a water source to fill it with water
- Combine ash with the bowl of water to obtain ash clay
- Place the ash clay on the floor to let it dry
- Once dry, pick up the ash bircks
- Combine the ash bricks in a 2x2 to create an ash bricks block
- Craft 8 ash bricks block into a furnace
